prompt_text:
### Demographics: 48-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 3 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after hyperglycemia symptoms (polyuria, polydipsia, weight loss)
Current symptoms: Reports 1-2 mild hypoglycemia episodes per month (self-resolved); no DKA/HHS signs

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3a (45-59)
Heart failure: HFmrEF (NYHA Class II)
Simple Steatosis
Body mass index category: Overweight
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3a (45-59); HF: HFmrEF (NYHA Class II); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Simple Steatosis; BMI Category: Overweight
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 3 years ago; 20 cigarettes/day for 15 years; ~15 pack-years); Alcohol 3-4 drinks/week (2-3 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Losartan (50 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily), Nitrofurantoin (100 mg twice daily for prophylaxis)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 57.3 kg; Height 151.6 cm; BMI 24.8 kg/m²; Blood pressure 116/64 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 10.6%; 9 months ago 10.0%; 6 months ago 9.8%; 3 months ago 9.5%; current 8.8%), FPG (12 months ago 285mg/dL; 9 months ago 226mg/dL; 6 months ago 227mg/dL; 3 months ago 244mg/dL; current 245mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 58.1kg; 9 months ago 56.3kg; 6 months ago 55.8kg; 3 months ago 58.2kg; current 57.3kg), Height (12 months ago 151.6cm; 9 months ago 151.6cm; 6 months ago 151.6cm; 3 months ago 151.6cm; current 151.6cm), BMI (12 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 25.0kg/m²; current 24.8kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 120mmHg; 9 months ago 120mmHg; 6 months ago 120mmHg; 3 months ago 120mmHg; current 116mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 63mmHg; 9 months ago 63mmHg; 6 months ago 64mmHg; 3 months ago 64mmHg; current 64mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 50U/L; 9 months ago 58U/L; 6 months ago 52U/L; 3 months ago 57U/L; current 54U/L), AST (12 months ago 39U/L; 9 months ago 34U/L; 6 months ago 31U/L; 3 months ago 33U/L; current 36U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.1mg/dL; current 1.1mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 60mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 55mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 55mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 57mL/min/1.73m²; current 55mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 101mg/g; 9 months ago 139mg/g; 6 months ago 119mg/g; 3 months ago 126mg/g; current 153mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 95mg/dL; 9 months ago 94mg/dL; 6 months ago 95mg/dL; 3 months ago 100mg/dL; current 97mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 48mg/dL; 9 months ago 52mg/dL; 6 months ago 48mg/dL; 3 months ago 51mg/dL; current 50mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 96mg/dL; 9 months ago 110mg/dL; 6 months ago 112mg/dL; 3 months ago 113mg/dL; current 104mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 14.0g/dL; 9 months ago 13.2g/dL; 6 months ago 13.0g/dL; 3 months ago 13.0g/dL; current 13.1g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
